title: Internet Traffic
description: Uplink/WAN interfaces, identified by their SNMP comment (ifAlias matching transit/internet/gateway/wan).

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, label, in_bps FROM (SELECT time, ifAlias AS label, (ifHCInOctets - lagInFrame(ifHCInOctets) OVER (PARTITION BY source, ifName ORDER BY time)) / greatest(toUnixTimestamp(time) - toUnixTimestamp(lagInFrame(time) OVER (PARTITION BY source, ifName ORDER BY time)), 1) * 8 AS in_bps FROM default.snmp WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND (ifAlias ILIKE '%transit%' OR ifAlias ILIKE '%internet%' OR ifAlias ILIKE '%gateway%' OR ifAlias ILIKE '%wan%')) WHERE in_bps >= 0 ORDER BY time

SELECT time, label, out_bps FROM (SELECT time, ifAlias AS label, (ifHCOutOctets - lagInFrame(ifHCOutOctets) OVER (PARTITION BY source, ifName ORDER BY time)) / greatest(toUnixTimestamp(time) - toUnixTimestamp(lagInFrame(time) OVER (PARTITION BY source, ifName ORDER BY time)), 1) * 8 AS out_bps FROM default.snmp WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND (ifAlias ILIKE '%transit%' OR ifAlias ILIKE '%internet%' OR ifAlias ILIKE '%gateway%' OR ifAlias ILIKE '%wan%')) WHERE out_bps >= 0 ORDER BY time
